The '''Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula''' was a conflict preceding the true start of the [[Swarm War]]. The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], under the lead of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]], originally attempted to prevent the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] of [[the Colony]] to further expand towards [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] space. Subsequently Alliance forces attempted to prevent the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] from escaping into open space. Even after it escaped, the blockade continued during the Swarm War, trapping many Killik forces within the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]]. The [[Battle of the Murgo Choke]] was one of the conflicts which was the direct result of the blockade.
